files.text:
version: 2
updates:
  - package-ecosystem: "github-actions"
    directory: "/"
    schedule:
      interval: "weekly"
  - package-ecosystem: "docker"
    directory: "/"
    schedule:
      interval: "weekly"

name: cve-scan
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  scan:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: Run OSV scanner over native deps
        uses: google/osv-scanner-action@v2
        with:
          scan-args: --lockfile=conanfile.txt --format=table
